---
title: "Appendix"
author: "Rishav Roy"
format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: xelatex
bibliography: references.bib
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| results: asis
legacy_path <- "../archive/legacy-paper-drafts/580-Draft-ECON-580.Rmd"
legacy <- readLines(legacy_path, warn = FALSE)
legacy <- paste(legacy, collapse = "\n")

strip_code_chunks <- function(x) {
  lines <- strsplit(x, "\n", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  out <- character()
  in_chunk <- FALSE
  for (line in lines) {
    if (startsWith(line, "```")) {
      in_chunk <- !in_chunk
      next
    }
    if (!in_chunk) out <- c(out, line)
  }
  paste(out, collapse = "\n")
}

extract_between <- function(x, start, end = NULL) {
  start_pos <- regexpr(start, x, perl = TRUE)
  if (start_pos < 0) stop("Could not find: ", start, call. = FALSE)
  if (is.null(end)) return(substr(x, start_pos, nchar(x)))
  rest <- substr(x, start_pos + attr(start_pos, "match.length"), nchar(x))
  end_pos <- regexpr(end, rest, perl = TRUE)
  if (end_pos < 0) return(substr(x, start_pos, nchar(x)))
  substr(x, start_pos, start_pos + attr(start_pos, "match.length") + end_pos - 2)
}

escape_inline_r <- function(x) {
  gsub("`r ([^`]+)`", "\\\\`r \\1\\\\`", x, perl = TRUE)
}

body <- strip_code_chunks(legacy)
body <- sub("^---.*?---", "", body, perl = TRUE)
appendix <- extract_between(
  body,
  "^# \\(APPENDIX\\) Appendix",
  "^# Technical Note for Replication"
)
technical <- extract_between(
  body,
  "^# Technical Note for Replication",
  "^# References"
)
cat(escape_inline_r(paste(appendix, technical, sep = "\n\n")))
```
